title: Kit's Paxels
description: A Paxel (pickaxe, axe, and shovel all-in-one) mod for Fabric 1.20+
body:
## About
![A diamond paxel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/271529e74392372ffa31834171839e00030e24e2.png) Introducing Kit's Paxels for Fabric 1.20+! Streamline your Minecraft experience with paxels: the all-in-one tool for mining, chopping, and digging. 

This has full support for breaking modded blocks, with the tools all having the same properties as their tool components. The durability is the material pickaxe durability x 2.5.

![An image showcasing all 6 paxels in the Minecraft tool materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LDOVpB7g/images/a7a0d5b127b3429686f37d845b6670ac54701752.png)
